title: McYari (bunii music discs)
description: A Minecraft resource pack that replaces the in-game music discs with tracks by the up and coming self produced, LA-based indie artist "bunii"
body:
# Discs Lists:
- Pigstep - Deaf
- Otherside - All That I Can Think About
- 13 - Grand Mal
- Cat - Natural
- Ward - b4bastard
- Tears - MY GOD
- 11 - Watermolen
- Stal - No difference
- Precipice - Joey
- Relic - NBA YOUNGBUNII
- Mall - Jane doe
- mellohi - galore galore galore
- Strad - Virgilio
- far - Circles

- Wait - Showers
- Blocks - GOOD RIDDANCE
---
![six](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4acee327961bdbe5a44e0c9040c92d9fea299714_0.webp)
---
This project is a custom Minecraft resource pack that replaces the default music disc tracks with songs from the Spotify artist **bunii**. Its purpose is to enhance the game’s atmosphere by introducing **bunii**’s distinctive musical style into the Minecraft experience. When players collect and play music discs in-game, they will hear **bunii**’s tracks instead of the original soundtrack, providing a fresh and personalized audio vibe.

In addition to the audio changes, the resource pack also updates the textures of the original music discs to feature **bunii**’s cover art. This gives each disc a unique visual identity that matches its new music, creating a cohesive and immersive experience for players. The pack does not alter any gameplay mechanics and remains fully compatible with standard Minecraft, making it easy to install and enjoy for anyone looking to personalize their world with **bunii**’s aesthetic and sound

[Bunii's Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/6mx3Y8XNLPaS2pjJbQFq3W?si=ynLi6yWzT2eW_JnAQ13peQ)
[Bunii's youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@ilove6yari)

Credit to buniiFan for the inventory collection idea :P
